subject: Escalation: signs of marsupial urban takeover in New York | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-9789
body: Following yesterday's call, the mainecoon effort in New York needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Marie Curie seems to disagree with Albert Einstein on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-9789. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: drop-bears, delivery.
